name: Spiced Date Drops
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 1:45
1. Coarsely chop dates and walnuts.
2. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and cloves; set aside.
3. Place softened margarine or butter into a large mixing bowl. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat until smooth and fluffy using medium speed.
4. Stir in the flour mixture with a wooden spoon until well combined. Stir in dates and walnuts. The dough will be very stiff.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 1 hour or more.
6. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls, spaced 2 inches apart, onto lightly greased cookie sheets. Bake in a preheated 400-degree oven for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned. Do not overcook.
7. Remove to wire racks and cool completely before storing.
Yield: About 72 cookies.
